extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout won from a reduced bunch sprint after late climbs shed pure sprinters like Groenewegen 14km from finish
tactical_patterns: BikeExchange pulled for Groenewegen despite him being dropped, revealing poor team communication on selective finales.
QuickStep sent Cavagna late solo from reduced group under 3km, forcing Ganna to close for Hayter.
Teams let breakaway bonus seconds go uncontested at intermediate sprint, prioritizing stage over GC positioning.

rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: dropped on final categorized climb with 14km flat remaining, suggesting poor form not just positioning
rider_signals.BAUHAUS Phil: negative: also distanced on final climb, indicating Bahrain's sprint options compromised early
rider_signals.HAYTER Ethan: positive: survived selective finale to finish second, more resilient than expected on lumpy stages
rider_signals.HONORE Michael: neutral: bridged to break on descent but lacked punch to stay clear, showed aggression
rider_signals.CAVAGNA Rémi: neutral: French champion attacked late from reduced group but lacked gap to hold off organized chase
